problem id: 547273aa
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  01000001 -> 10000010
  01110010 -> 11100100
  10111000 -> 01110001
  00100101 -> 01001010
  11000111 -> 10001111
  10101001 -> 01010011
  00011100 -> 00111000
  11011110 -> 10111101

query: 10110100
predicted answer: 01101001
